root_cause: Redis memory exhaustion on RetailMax Cache caused by deployment DEP-20250316-003 two days ago which changed maxmemory-policy from allkeys-lru to noeviction. With noeviction policy, Redis cannot evict keys when memory is full and begins rejecting write commands, causing CartService and ProductAPI to fail on cache writes.

alternative_hypotheses.hypothesis: Memory leak in application code causing abnormal cache growth independent of eviction policy change
alternative_hypotheses.evidence_for: Memory usage has been climbing steadily over 48 hours which could indicate a leak pattern
alternative_hypotheses.evidence_against: DEP-20250316-003 changed maxmemory-policy to noeviction two days ago which directly prevents key eviction. Without eviction, any normal cache growth will eventually exhaust memory. No code changes were deployed alongside the Redis configuration change.

alternative_hypotheses.hypothesis: Sudden traffic spike causing cache to fill faster than normal eviction can handle
alternative_hypotheses.evidence_for: CartService showing elevated request rates in the last 2 hours
alternative_hypotheses.evidence_against: The noeviction policy means Redis cannot evict regardless of traffic level. Even normal traffic will exhaust memory with this policy. The deployment correlation is the primary causal factor.

explanation_for_engineer: RetailMax Redis Cache is experiencing OOM errors because deployment DEP-20250316-003 two days ago changed maxmemory-policy from allkeys-lru to noeviction. With noeviction, Redis cannot free memory by evicting old keys, so as the cache fills it begins rejecting all write commands. CartService and ProductAPI are receiving REDIS_COMMAND_REJECTED errors on cache writes. The recommended action will execute CONFIG SET maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru to restore the eviction policy, allowing Redis to manage memory automatically. No historical precedent exists for this exact pattern on RetailMax — this is a cold-start scenario requiring human review before execution.
technical_evidence_summary: Redis agent: REDIS_OOM, OOM command not allowed when used memory > maxmemory, memory at 94% of capacity. Deployment correlation: DEP-20250316-003 MODIFIED_CONFIG_OF Redis Cache (maxmemory-policy noeviction, 2 days ago). Semantic search: no historical match above 0.67 similarity (cold-start veto active). Blast radius: CartService, ProductAPI, CDN. GDPR compliance active — human review required.
